vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for #163: Enforce USER.md gate in CLI path -- parity with agentic (skills) path

plan.title: Enforce USER.md gate in CLI path -- parity with agentic (skills) path

items.title: Add USER.md presence check at cmd_spec entry; emit clear redirect to `run bootstrap` and exit non-zero on missing

narrative.Action: Mirror the agentic-path behavior in `deft-build` (USER.md gate). At `cmd_spec` entry, resolve USER.md per platform (`%APPDATA%\deft\USER.md` on Windows, `~/.config/deft/USER.md` on Unix; `$DEFT_USER_PATH` overrides). If missing, emit a clear message redirecting the user to `run bootstrap` and exit non-zero before any spec-generation work runs.
narrative.Acceptance: `cmd_spec` exits with a helpful, actionable message when USER.md is absent; the message names the expected path and suggests `run bootstrap`. Existing happy-path behavior unchanged when USER.md is present.

items.title: Mirror the same USER.md gate at cmd_project entry

narrative.Action: Apply the same gate from item `usermd-gate-cmd-spec` at `cmd_project` entry. Identical resolution chain, identical message shape, identical non-zero exit on missing.
narrative.Acceptance: `cmd_project` exits with a helpful, actionable message when USER.md is absent. Behavior identical to `cmd_spec` for parity. Existing happy-path behavior unchanged when USER.md is present.

items.title: Tests cover missing-USER.md early-exit for both commands plus existing-happy-path regression

narrative.Action: Add unit/integration tests under `tests/cli/` (or wherever existing CLI tests live) covering: (a) `cmd_spec` exits non-zero with the expected message when USER.md is absent, (b) `cmd_project` exits non-zero with the expected message when USER.md is absent, (c) both commands proceed normally when USER.md is present at the resolved path, (d) `$DEFT_USER_PATH` override is honored on both commands. Use a test fixture or temporary directory to avoid polluting the developer's actual USER.md.
narrative.Acceptance: All four test cases pass for both commands. Existing tests unchanged. `task check` green.

x-migrator.Description: Enforce USER.md gate in CLI path -- parity with agentic (skills) path
